name: Black Bean Chili
recipeIngredient: 3 cups turkey (light meat, skinless, cooked and cubed)
32 ounces black beans, drained and washed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet over medium heat, warm the olive oil.
2. Add onions, bell peppers, and garlic to the skillet. Cook until vegetables are tender.
3. Stir in chili powder, oregano, cumin, and salt.
4. Add turkey, crushed tomatoes, and water. Stir well.
5. Simmer, uncovered, for 15 minutes.
6. Stir in black beans; cook for an additional 15 minutes or until slightly thickened.
7. Remove the skillet from heat and stir in grated cheddar cheese.
